underlying_goal: Refactor a Laravel 13 application by modernizing models, removing legacy code, consolidating controllers, and adding Form Request validation for public POST routes
friction_detail: Assistant skipped Form Request creation initially, prematurely made invokable controllers that needed create/store, mixed scope definitions instead of using only #[Scope], and made unsolicited commits despite explicit instruction not to
brief_summary: User directed a systematic Laravel refactoring spanning model modernization, dead code removal, controller restructuring to resourceful/invokable patterns, Form Request validation for POST routes, and view simplification with precomputed flags, achieving a cleaner codebase with passing tests throughout.
user_instructions_to_assistant: do not make commits unless explicitly asked
use only #[Scope] attributes for scopes, not mixed definitions
prefer Action extraction or keep logic inline, do not extract to private controller methods
